name: modeljudge-ai
description: ModelJudge AI — explainable multi-criteria evaluation for tabular supervised models

scripts.build: npm run build -w @modeljudge/shared && npm run build -w @modeljudge/api && npm run build -w @modeljudge/worker && npm run build -w @modeljudge/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @modeljudge/api --if-present && npm run lint -w @modeljudge/web --if-present
scripts.test: npm run test -w @modeljudge/shared && npm run test -w @modeljudge/api && npm run test -w @modeljudge/worker && npm run test -w @modeljudge/web && npm run test:ml
